name: property managers handling 10-20 properties/month tool
description: For property managers handling 10-20 properties/month, missed lease renewals cause cash flow gaps. We automate alerts instead of manual tracking of lease dates and rent increases.
problem_solved: Missed lease renewals and escalations leading to cash flow gaps.
features: Monthly alert system for lease renewals
Monthly alert system for rent escalations

locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking of lease dates and rent increases
must_have_features: Monthly alert system for lease renewals
Monthly alert system for rent escalations
